PostToolUse.description: Report significant tool usage to Ferni for voice narration

Stop.description: Notify Ferni when Claude finishes responding
Stop.command: npx tsx ./scripts/mcp/hook-notify-ferni.ts completion "I'm ready for your next request"

SubagentStop.description: Notify Ferni when a subagent task completes
SubagentStop.command: npx tsx ./scripts/mcp/hook-notify-ferni.ts progress "Finished the background task"
